prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约1905名→2217名→3142名→5525名→5565名，整体呈持续后移趋势，2024年大幅后移约2383名，2025年基本持平于5565名，近两 年位次趋于稳定；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为27人，2023年28人，2024–2025年30人，2026年增至31人，较2025年小幅扩招约3.3%，扩招 对竞争略有缓解，位次数字有增大倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，稳居全国顶尖财经类高校之首，层次优 势突出；声誉文件中无上海财经大学明显负面记录；抖音热度排名第99（评价"一般"），综合热度约13.3万，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现投档异常 或断档信号，整体声誉平稳；第五轮学科评估中，工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，财经学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生有持续吸引力。\ n金融/财经/经济类专业2024年热度评估为"分化观望"，整体热度一般偏分化；重庆2026年普通高考总人数约20.9万，按近年物理类占比约65.5%估算约13.69万人，较2025年物理类13.95万人略减约1.9%，考生规模小幅下降对 竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招、考生总数略有减少及声誉平稳等因素，在2025年基准 5565名基础上，扩招效应略大于考生减少效应，预计最低位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约5706名，区间5206–6206名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1905 → 2217 → 3142 → 5525 → 5565, showing a continuous backward trend overall. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift of about 2383 places, and in 2025 it remained basically stable at 5565. The rankings have stabilized in the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's Physics Category was 27 students in 2021–2022, 28 in 2023, 30 in 2024–2025, and will increase to 31 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 3.3% compared to 2025. The expansion slightly eases competition, with a tendency for ranking numbers to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 35th, firmly at the top of China's elite finance and economics universities, with outstanding level advantages. There are no obvious negative records in the reputation file. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 99 (rated 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity of about 133,000, indicating a medium-to-low level of short video exposure. No abnormal admissions or discontinuation signals have appeared, and overall reputation is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Business Administration received A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, and Statistics A-, demonstrating top-tier strength in finance and economics disciplines, which continues to attract high-scoring students. Finance/Accounting/Economics majors had a 2024 popularity assessment of 'differentiated wait-and-see', with overall popularity being average and differentiated. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Chongqing is about 209,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 65.5%, it is estimated at about 136,900, a slight decrease of about 1.9% from the 2025 Physics Category total of 139,500. The small decline in candidate numbers slightly eases competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the slight decrease in total candidates, and stable reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 5565, the expansion effect is slightly larger than the candidate reduction effect. The minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5706, with a range of 5206–6206.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5206–6206, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Statistics, Economics, Financial Management, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Accounting, Finance) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Computer Science, Data Science, Mathematics, etc.) as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 5206), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 6206), consider Tier 3 majors first to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the History Category were approximately 303 → 368 → 536 → 741 → 669, showing an overall backward trend, but in 2025 it rebounded by about 72 places compared to 2024, indicating a stabilization of competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's History Category was 14 students in 2021–2022, 13 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 15 in 2025–2026, with the 2026 plan unchanged from 2025, showing no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly at the top of the nation's elite finance and economics universities, with outstanding level advantages; there are no obvious negative records of Shanghai University of Finance and Economics in the reputation file; Douyin popularity ranking is 99 (rated 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity of about 133,000, short video exposure at a medium-low level, no abnormal or gap signals in admissions, overall reputation stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, the university's finance and economics disciplines are top in the country, continuously attracting high-scoring liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/economics/economic majors was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', with overall popularity generally average and differentiated; the total number of Chongqing 2026 general college entrance examination students is about 209,000, estimated at about 72,100 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 34.5%, a slight decrease of about 1.8% from the 2025 History Category of 73,400, and the slight decline in the number of candidates slightly eases competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trends, the unchanged 2026 plan, a slight decrease in the total number of candidates, and the rebound in 2025 rankings, based on the 2025 baseline of 669, the effect of the decrease in candidates slightly dominates, and the minimum ranking is expected to move forward slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 649, with a range of 551–747.
